app_description.message: Sync invoices from KSeF to Google Sheets. Auto-sync, incoming invoice feed, dashboard, notifications. Security-first, no backend.

google_settings_not_connected.message: Not connected. Use the popup to connect.

setup_description.message: First-time setup. Your KSeF token is encrypted with your passphrase and stored locally — never sent anywhere except KSeF itself.

unlock_description.message: Vault is locked. Enter your passphrase.

sync_connect_google_hint.message: Connect Google above to also save them to a sheet.

picker_no_target.message: No target sheet — next sync will create one.

picker_no_sheets.message: No app-created sheets yet. Click "Create new" below to make one on the next sync.

picker_create_new.message: + Create new sheet on next sync

autosync_note.message: — runs while the browser is open

autosync_label_options.message: Auto-sync every $min$ min while browser is open

options_tracking_cleared.message: Tracking cleared — next sync re-writes all rows

vault_remember_warning.message: The vault key is wrapped with a non-extractable browser key and stored locally. A copied Chrome profile cannot decrypt it — but an attacker running code inside your browser can. Keep this off on shared devices.

vault_not_initialized.message: Not initialized. Use the popup to set up.

vault_locked.message: Locked. Open the popup to unlock.

danger_destroy_vault_desc.message: Deletes the encrypted KSeF token and NIP. You'll need to re-enter them.

danger_reset_all_desc.message: Vault + Google + sheet config + tracking. Complete fresh start.

danger_all_cleared.message: All data cleared. Reload to start fresh.

error_hint_vault_locked.message: Open the popup and enter your passphrase to unlock.

error_hint_vault_not_init.message: Set up the vault first: enter your passphrase, KSeF token, and NIP in the popup.

error_hint_wrong_passphrase.message: Double-check your passphrase. If you've forgotten it, destroy and re-create the vault from Settings.

error_hint_ksef_token_invalid.message: KSeF rejected the token. It may be expired or revoked. Generate a new one at ap-test.ksef.mf.gov.pl.

error_hint_ksef_auth_failed.message: KSeF authentication failed. Check that your NIP and token are correct.

error_hint_ksef_auth_timeout.message: KSeF auth timed out. The test environment may be slow — try again in a minute.

error_hint_ksef_truncated.message: KSeF returned a truncated result. Try narrowing the date range.

error_hint_ksef_server_error.message: KSeF server error. The test environment is occasionally unstable — try again later.

error_hint_google_cancelled.message: The Google sign-in dialog was closed. Click 'Connect Google' to try again.

error_hint_google_csrf.message: Security check failed (CSRF). Try connecting again — if it persists, restart the browser.

error_hint_google_token_exchange.message: Google token exchange failed. Try disconnecting and reconnecting your Google account.

error_hint_google_not_connected.message: Connect your Google account first using the 'Connect Google' button.

error_hint_google_not_configured.message: Build error: the extension was built without Google credentials. See README for setup.

error_hint_sheets_api.message: Google Sheets API error. Check that the Sheets API is enabled in your Google Cloud project.

error_hint_drive_api.message: Google Drive API error. Check that the Drive API is enabled in your Google Cloud project.

error_hint_network.message: Network error. Check your internet connection and try again.

error_hint_unknown.message: Something went wrong. Check the details below and try again.

status_go_to_config.message: Go to the Config tab to set up.

options_calendar_needs_reconnect.message: Missing Calendar permission. Disconnect Google and reconnect to grant calendar access.

options_fetch_on_resume.message: Catch up on browser start / wake from sleep

options_fetch_on_resume_hint.message: If the last sync is older than the interval above, pull fresh data when the browser opens or the computer wakes up.

options_fetch_on_resume_hint_v2.message: Catch up when the browser starts or the computer wakes — if the last sync is older than the interval below.

options_fetch_on_resume_hint_v3.message: Catch up when the browser starts or the computer wakes — if the last sync is older than the sync interval set on the Status tab.

config_calendar_enable.message: Add invoice due dates to Google Calendar

config_sheets_enable.message: Sync invoices to a Google Sheet

options_ksef_env_prod_warning.message: Production environment — real invoices, real tax data. Use with caution.
